ddls:
CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the brand */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was established */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the brand */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand's logo image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender category (e.g., Men, Women, Kids) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group (e.g., Adult, Child) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand the product belongs to */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "fit_type" TEXT /* Fit type (e.g., Regular, Slim, Loose) */,
  "is_seasonal" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is seasonal */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the product (e.g., Spring, Summer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., S, M, L) */,
  "us_size" INTEGER /* US size equivalent */,
  "bust" INTEGER /* Bust measurement in cm */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length measurement in cm */,
  "sleeve_length" INTEGER /* Sleeve length measurement in cm */,
  "eu_size" INTEGER /* EU size equivalent */,
  "uk_size" INTEGER /* UK size equivalent */,
  "waist" INTEGER /* Waist measurement in cm */,
  "hip" INTEGER /* Hip measurement in cm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product-size association */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock for this size */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Date of the last stock update */,
  "next_restock_date" TEXT /* Expected date of the next restock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "anniversary_date" TEXT /* Anniversary date of the customer (e.g., wedding anniversary) */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer preference */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "preferred_brand_ids" TEXT /* Array of preferred brand IDs */,
  "preferred_category_ids" TEXT /* Array of preferred category IDs */,
  "fit_recommendations" TEXT /* Fit recommendations for the customer */,
  "preferred_size_ids" TEXT /* Array of preferred size IDs */,
  "fit_preference" TEXT /* General fit preference (e.g., Tight, Loose) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used (e.g., Standard, Express) */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product in the order */,
  "is_gift" INTEGER /* Indicates if the item is a gift */,
  "gift_message" TEXT /* Gift message if the item is a gift */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order item being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the return was initiated */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return (e.g., wrong size, damaged) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., pending, approved, refunded) */,
  "return_tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the return */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount refunded for the return */,
  "return_reason_details" TEXT /* Detailed reason for the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_item_id") REFERENCES order_items ("order_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fit_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fit feedback */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "fit_rating" INTEGER /* Fit rating (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the customer */,
  "is_recommendation" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer recommends the product */,
  "fit_accuracy" INTEGER /* Accuracy of the fit (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fit_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fit_feedback_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fit_feedback_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory log */,
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product size */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the inventory change was logged */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., add, remove) */,
  "change_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the inventory change (e.g., Restock, Damage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_product_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_size_id") REFERENCES product_sizes ("product_size_id")
)
